title: feature request. enable espnow bridge for companions who can support it.

messages.author: Maveric
messages.text: it would be nice to have dual espnow and lora supported companions so that a companion can first try to send a message over espnow and if it gets an ack first on espnow it then listens on lora for the repeat of that message and then it will not try to TX the message over lora. So espnow enabled repeaters can accept messages and forward on for clients without consuming lora RF space listening to clients
messages.content_html: it would be nice to have dual espnow and lora supported companions so that a companion can first try to send a message over espnow and if it gets an ack first on espnow it then listens on lora for the repeat of that message and then it will not try to TX the message over lora. So espnow enabled repeaters can accept messages and forward on for clients without consuming lora RF space listening to clients
messages.reactions_html: 6
